summary: Profile of gaited-horse clinician Jody Childs, who offers video-based gaited horse training and tailors her workshops to attendees.
Announcement of a Horsemanship Radio interview with Debbie Roberts-Loucks, plus a free gift and overview of the Monty Roberts Equus Online University.
Invitation to visit Cavallo partner Valley Vet at the Road To The Horse colt-starting championship in Lexington, Kentucky, March 23-26.
Customer testimonial from Dawn about Cavallo hoof boots staying on through mud and streams on Smoky Mountains trails versus a horse that threw a shoe.
Feature on PATH Intl. and its accredited center Hearts & Hooves, highlighting therapeutic riding awards and equine-assisted activities for individuals with special needs.
Short testimonial from Gaited Riding University's Jody Childs praising Cavallo saddle pads and boots after six years of use.
Customer testimonial from Diane Colvin shared at Equine Affair, recounting Cavallo hoof boots staying attached after her horse sank into quicksand.
Recap of the Equine Affair 2017 show, featuring clinicians Guy McLean, Dan James and Julie Goodnight, and Cavallo's barefoot hoof care presentation.
Preview of the Rolex Kentucky three-day eventing competition, where Cavallo appears at the Valley Vet Supply booth #144.
Story of rescue mini horse Pippa, whose laminitis pain was eased by Cavallo Cute Little Boots through the volunteer-run Hope Reins program.
Feature on Emma Massingale's solo horseboarding trip along the 185-mile Hebridean Way in Scotland with her ponies wearing Cavallo Trek Boots.
Overview of Brumby Week, an international wild horse convention in Central Australia, framed around the natural barefoot survival of wild horses.
